title: helichrysum argenteum
intro: Helichrysum argenteum, also known as Silver Gum or Curled Gum, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum argenteum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and provide relief from symptoms.
